readings.Aries: There is a cost to being first every time. You've been paying it without accounting for it. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Taurus: The waiting you've been doing is almost over. You will need to be ready to move. The first instinct was right.
readings.Gemini: You have been agreeable. You are allowed to have a position. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Cancer: The mood has been difficult and you've been managing it alone. That arrangement can change. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Leo: There's a fear underneath the pride. Name it privately, even if only to yourself. The first instinct was right.
readings.Virgo: There is a relationship you've been analysing instead of experiencing. Enter it. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Libra: Someone is asking you to take their side. You are stalling. At some point stalling is a choice. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Scorpio: You've been managing your own depth to avoid frightening people. Today, someone can handle it. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Sagittarius: The enthusiasm you've withdrawn from a project was the project's primary fuel source. Restore some. The first instinct was right.
readings.Capricorn: You have given the work everything. The work has given back. Notice what it hasn't given. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Aquarius: Something you've classified as not your problem has been your problem the entire time. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Pisces: The art you've been carrying in your chest needs to leave your chest. Make something. The question matters more than the answer right now.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
